title: ShopPerformed telemetry event
description: Realises DASHBOARD_DELTA_0.2_LIVE_READSIDE.md §3. Emitted by the Offer module once per Shop call and once per CombineAndPrice, stage-tagged. TELEMETRY-GRADE: Offer is stateless/storeless, so publication is best-effort fire-and-forget (at-most-once; may be lost under failure). Consumers MUST treat funnel-top figures as directional and MUST NOT derive money figures from this event. Envelope follows the platform convention but carries searchId instead of orderId.

eventId.description: Idempotency key for consumers (dedupe still applies; loss may, too).

searchId.description: Stable across the stages of one shopping journey (outbound, return, combine).

stage.description: Funnel rule: count stage=OUTBOUND as 'searches'; sum offersReturned across stages as 'offers'. ONE_WAY journeys emit stage=OUTBOUND only.
